mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_ATTACHMENT (meeting_id, original_name, stored_name, file_path, file_size) VALUES (#{meetingId}, #{originalName}, #{storedName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize})
mapper.select: SELECT attachment_id, meeting_id, original_name, stored_name, file_path, file_size, created_at FROM T_ATTACHMENT WHERE attachment_id = #{attachmentId}
SELECT attachment_id, meeting_id, original_name, stored_name, file_path, file_size, created_at FROM T_ATTACHMENT WHERE meeting_id = #{meetingId}
